REQUIREMENTS

Course Title

Credits

Any two 2xx-level courses in Musicology and Ethnomusicology including: 1

6

MUSC204

Popular Music in Black America

MUSC210 The Impact of Music on Life

MUSC215 World Popular Musics and Identity

MUSC220 Selected Musical Cultures of the World

MUSC289I

MUSC289I

Exploring the Power of Musical Performance in

Social Engagement

Three 400-level courses, including at least two of the MUSC438 area studies courses. 2

9

Recent offerings include:

MUSC 438D Music of Bolivia, Peru, and Ecuador

MUSC 438E Music of the Balkans

MUSC 438K Music in the Middle East

MUSC 438M Mexican and Mexican/American Music

MUSC 438S Music of Southeast Asia

MUSC 438X Music of China and Japan

The following courses may also be used to satisfy this

requirement:

MUSC435

MUSC448

MUSC448F Music and Film in Cross-Cultural

Perspectives

Performance Courses 3
